description: Yggdrasil address derivation test vector from official Yggdrasil (adapted for LICHEN IID unification). Seed all-0x01, matches Rust lichen-link::identity::yggdrasil_addr_from_pubkey, C lichen_identity_ygg_addr_from_ed25519, and Python ipv6.addr equivalent oracle.
Zero pubkey vector verifying U/L bit clear in IID and Yggdrasil prefix. Matches all three oracles and spec/04-network.md.
Known vector from Yggdrasil official test suite (pubkey from Ed25519 test vector). Verified cross-oracle.
note: Adapted SHA512 prefix + LICHEN IID unification; full official Yggdrasil would use different lower bits but LICHEN unifies with IID
